title: Ethiopian Tagine Stuffed Squash
description: A flavorful and nutritious recipe that combines the spices of Ethiopia with the rich flavors of a tagine, all wrapped up in a delicious squash.

ingredients.name: Squash
ingredients.notes: acorn or butternut squash works well

ingredients.name: Tagine spice blend
ingredients.notes: or use a mixture of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

ingredients.name: Mellow
ingredients.notes: chopped fresh herbs, such as parsley or cilantro

instructions: Cut the squash in half lengthwise and scoop out the seeds.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the tagine spice blend and Berbere spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Stuff each squash half with the onion and spice mixture.
Top each squash half with chopped mellow herbs.
Place the stuffed squash on a baking sheet and bake for 30-40 minutes, or until the squash is tender.
